title: exp_063 -- Extended Training (10M+ steps, no logstd clamp)
hypothesis: Swift trains 100M steps; we train 1.5M. Remove max_logstd clamp and train much longer.
what_to_change: Remove logstd clamp and train for 10M+ steps.
expected_outcome: If undertraining is the bottleneck, extended training with unclamped variance should show continued improvement.
scope_note: Depends on exp_061, 062, 064 results. High compute cost.
